blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 11".
